set.name: LORT-RT
set.longname: Legends Of Runeterra Converted: Rising Tides

card.name: Valor
card.text: Challenger, Scout (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature. Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)

card.name: Tail of the Dragon LORT-RT
card.text: If Tail of the Dragon is recalled, you may put a card named Concussive Palm from your graveyard into your hand. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Dragonling LORT-RT
card.text: Lifelink, Ephemeral (This creature can attack and T as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Zap Sprayfin
card.text: Skulk, Attune: {C} (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.) When Zap Sprayfin enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 3 or less, add it to your hand and shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Yordle Grifter
card.text: When Yordle Grifter enters, reveal the card on top of your library, if the revealed card has the same colour identity as Yordle Grifter, then exile the card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast the card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy. Then put a charge counter on Yordle Grifter. {T}: Remove a charge counter from Yordle Grifter. Yordle Grifter deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Ye Been Warned
card.text: Target creature gets Vulnerable until end of turn. If the target creature is destroyed this turn, draw a card. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Vicious Platewyrm LORT-RT
card.text: Fearsome, Deep (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.)

card.name: Twisted Fate
card.text: First strike Whenever Twisted Fate enters, choose one — • Add {C} and draw a card. • Twisted Fate deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. • Twisted Fate deals 2 damage to the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls, then put a stun counter on it. Whenever you draw a card, put a Swindler counter on Twisted Fate. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Twisted Fate has nine or more Swindler counters, remove all Swindler counters from Twisted Fate and transform him. Partner --- (Back): Twisted Fate, The Card Master

card.name: Twisted Fate, The Card Master
card.text: First strike The first time you cast a spell each turn add {C} and draw a card. The second time you cast a spell each turn, Twisted Fate deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. The third time you cast a spell each turn, Twisted Fate deals 2 damage to the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls, then put a stun counter on it. --- (Front): Twisted Fate

card.name: Treasure Trove LORT-RT
card.text: {5}: Sacrifice Treasure Trove. Exile the top five cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way for as long as they remain exiled without paying their mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Syren
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Captain Fortune, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. Whenever a source you control would deal noncombat damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead.

card.name: The Dreadway
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Captain Gangplank, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If a noncombat source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead.

card.name: The Beast Below
card.text: Deep (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.)

card.name: Strong-arm
card.text: Plunder: return a creature to its owners hand. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this spell is cast return a creature to its owners hand.)

card.name: Smooth Soloist
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Plunder: exile any number of creature cards from your hand. You may cast a card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled and costs {2} less to cast. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters exile any number of creature cards from your hand. You may cast a card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled and costs {2} less to cast.)

card.name: Slotbot
card.text: When Slotbot enters and at the start of your pre-combat main phase, Slotbot gets +0/+1 for each card in hand, then swap Slotbots power and toughness.

card.name: Slippery Waverider
card.text: Skulk, Attune: {C} (When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.)

card.name: Sleight of Hand
card.text: Randomly choose a card from among cards in target opponents hand, reveal it, if it is a nonlegendry creature, exile it. You may cast that card from exile for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy.

card.name: Shipwreck Hoarder
card.text: Deep (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.) When Shipwreck Hoarder enters, Toss 1, then roll a d20. Repeat this process once. (Exile a card from the bottom of your library.) [b]1-7 [/b]| Create a Treasure Trove token. [b]8-14 [/b]| Create a Keelbreaker Token. [b]15-20 [/b]| Create three Vicious Platewyrm tokens.

card.name: Sheriff Lariette Rose
card.text: When Sheriff Lariette Rose enters, each creature your opponents control get Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Shellshocker
card.text: Attune: {C} (When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.)

card.name: Scrapshot
card.text: Toss 3 (Exile three cards from the bottom of your library.) Scrapshot deals 7 damage to target creature.

card.name: Salvage
card.text: Toss 2, then draw two cards. (Exile two cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Riptide Rex
card.text: Plunder: Riptide Rex deals 2 damage to a random creature a random opponent controls. If an opponent has no creatures, Riptide Rex deals 1 damage to that opponent instead. Repeat this process six times. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters Riptide Rex deals 2 damage to a random creature a random opponent controls. If an opponent has no creatures, Riptide Rex deals 1 damage to that opponent instead. Repeat this process six times.)

card.name: Riptide
card.text: Kicker {R} (You may pay an additional {R} as you cast this spell.) Put a stun counter onto target creature an opponent controls. If this card was kicked, shuffle target creature into its owners library instead.

card.name: Razorscale Hunter
card.text: Scout. (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) When Razorscale Hunter enters, target creature you don't control gets Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Prowling Cutthroat
card.text: Skulk, Fearsome (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: Powder Monkey LORT-RT
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) When Powder Monkey leaves the battlefield, Powder Monkey deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Powder Keg LORT-RT
card.text: Vulnerable (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) Powder Keg cannot attack or block. If you would create a Powder Keg while you already have one, add a Keg counter onto your Powder Keg instead. If a noncombat source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, sacrifice your Powder Keg. The noncombat source you control deals that much damage plus 1+X where X is the number of Keg counters on the sacrificed Powder Keg.

card.name: Pool Shark
card.text: When Pool Shark enters, put a charge counter on Pool Shark. At the start of your draw step, remove a charge counter from Pool Shark and exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card from exile until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Pocket Aces
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+1. Miracle {1}{BR} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Plunder Poro
card.text: Plunder: randomly choose two abilities from among first strike, vigilance, menace, lifelink, flying, haste, reach, hexproof, and trample. Plunder Poro has each of the chosen abilities. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters randomly choose two abilities from among first strike, vigilance, menace, lifelink, flying, haste, reach, hexproof, and trample. Plunder Poro has each of the chosen abilities.)

card.name: Playful Trickster
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, Recall an attacking or blocking creature you control. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Pilfered Goods
card.text: Nab 1 (Exile a card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy. ) Plunder: Nab 1 (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this spell is cast Nab 1.)

card.name: Pick a Card
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, shuffle one card from your hand into your library. At the start of your next upkeep, exile the top two cards of your library. You may cast these cards from exile until the end of turn.

card.name: Petty Officer
card.text: When Petty Officer enters, choose one — • Create a Powder Keg token. • Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures with mana value 1, randomly choose one, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Parrrley
card.text: Parrrley deals 1 damage to any target. If Parrrley destroys a creature, Parrrley deals 1 damage to that creatures controller.

card.name: Mystifying Magician
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, put a nontoken creature you control to the bottom of your library. When Mystifying Magician enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card with mana value 5, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: More Powder!
card.text: Create two Powder Keg tokens.

card.name: Monkey Idol
card.text: Vanishing 3 (This creature enters with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) Monkey Idol cannot attack or block. At the start of your upkeep, create a Powder Monkey token.

card.name: Mind Meld
card.text: Until the end of your turn, creatures you control get +X/+X where X is the number of instants and sorcery spells you cast this turn.

card.name: Make it Rain
card.text: Make it Rain randomly deals 1 damage to an opponent or creature they control. Repeat this process two times.

card.name: Lure of the Depths
card.text: You get an emblem with "Leviathan creatures you control cost {1} less to cast". Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Leviathan creature, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Keelbreaker LORT-RT
card.text: {5}: Sacrifice Keelbreaker. Keelbreaker deals 5 damage to all creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Jettison
card.text: Toss 4 (Exile four cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Jaull Hunters
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) When Jaull Hunters enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three leviathan creatures, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Jailbreak
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 1, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Jagged Taskmaster
card.text: Plunder: Jagged Taskmaster gets "creatures you control with mana value 1 have +1/+0" (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters Jagged Taskmaster gets "creatures you control with mana value 1 have +1/+0".)

card.name: Jagged Butcher
card.text: Plunder: put a +1/+1 counter on Jagged Butcher. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters put a +1/+1 counter on Jagged Butcher.)

card.name: Island Navigator
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) When Island Navigator enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 1, put that creature onto the battlefield under your control and give it Scout, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Hunting Fleet
card.text: Gift a Golden Narwhal token.

card.name: Hired Gun
card.text: When Hired Gun enters, the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls gets Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Golden Narwhal
card.text: Skulk, Vulnerable (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Fizz
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery, exile Fizz, then return Fizz to the battlefield under your control. Whenever Fizz enters, you get an experience counter. At the end of any phase, if you have six or more experience counters, transform Fizz. Partner --- (Back): Fizz, The Tidal Trickster

card.name: Fizz, The Tidal Trickster
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery, exile Fizz, then return Fizz, The Tidal Trickster to the battlefield under your control. When Fizz, The Tidal Trickster deals combat damage to an opponent, target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable, then create Longtooth token. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) --- (Front): Fizz

card.name: Dreg Dredgers
card.text: When Dreg Dredgers enters, Toss 3 (Exile three cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Dreadway Deckhand
card.text: When Dreadway Deckhand enters, create a Powder Keg token.

card.name: Double Up
card.text: Double Up deals 2 damage to target creature an opponent controls. If Double Up destroys that creature, Double Up deals 4 damage to that creatures controller.

card.name: Double Trouble
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two creatures with mana value 1, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Devourer of the Depths
card.text: Deep (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.) When Devourer of the Depths enters, you may exile target creature an opponent controls with less toughness than Devourer of the Depths.

card.name: Crackshot Corsair
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, Crackshot Corsair deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Coral Creatures
card.text: Attune: {C} (When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.) When Coral Creatures enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three instant and/or sorcery cards with mana value 1, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Citrus Courier
card.text: Plunder: remove all damage from each creature you control, then you gain 3 life. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters remove all damage from each creature you control, then you gain 3 life. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.)

card.name: Chum the Waters
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable. Create a Longtooth token. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Captain Gangplank
card.text: Trample When Captain Gangplank enters, create a Powder Keg token. The first time each turn a source you control deals damage to an opponent, put a Citrus counter on Captain Gangplank. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Captain Gangplank has five or more Citrus counters, remove all Citrus counters from Captain Gangplank, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Gangplank, The Saltwater Scourge

card.name: Gangplank, The Saltwater Scourge
card.text: Trample When Gangplank transforms and at the start of your upkeep, create a Powder Keg token. Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, Gangplank deals 1 damage to all opponents and creatures they control. --- (Front): Captain Gangplank

card.name: Captain Fortune
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, put a Fortune counter on Captain Fortune. At the end of any phase on your turn, if there are four or more Fortune counters on Captain Fortune, remove all Fortune counters from Captain Fortune, then transform her. At the beginning of the combat damage step of each combat during your turn, Captain Fortune deals 1 damage to target player and each blocking creature they control. Partner --- (Back): Miss Fortune, The Queen of Bilgewater
card.related: Miss Fortune, The Queen of Bilgewater

card.name: Miss Fortune, The Queen of Bilgewater
card.text: Trample At the beginning of the combat damage step of each combat during your turn, Miss Fortune deals 1 damage to each player and each blocking creature they control. Repeat this process two times. --- (Front): Captain Fortune

card.name: Bubble Bear
card.text: Skulk, Attune: {C} (When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.)

card.name: Brash Gambler
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards from your hand. Brash (Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with toughness 2 or less.) When Brash Gambler attacks, exile two cards from the top of your library. You may cast these cards from exile until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Black Market Merchant
card.text: Plunder: exile a card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters exile a card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy.) Casting cards from exile costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Abyssal Eye
card.text: Skulk, Deep (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.) Whenever Abyssal Eye deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card.

card.name: Nautilus
card.text: Fearsome, Absorb 1 (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) At the end of any phase on your turn, if you are Deep, transform Nautilus. (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.) Partner --- (Back): Nautilus, The Titan of the Depths
card.related: Nautilus, The Titan of the Depths

card.name: Nautilus, The Titan of the Depths
card.text: Fearsome, Absorb 1 (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Nautilus transforms, all creatures with mana value 4 or greater in your exile and graveyard are shuffled into your library. Leviathan and Giant creatures you control cost {4} less to cast. --- (Front): Nautilus

card.name: Sapling LORT-RT
card.text: Ephemeral, Challenger (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)

card.name: Vi, The Piltover Enforcer
card.text: Challenger, Absorb 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, Vi gets +1/+0. At the start of your post-combat main phase, if Vi attacked and dealt 10 or more combat damage, remove all counters from Vi and transform her. Partner --- (Back): Vi, Piltover's Finest

card.name: Vi, Piltover's Finest
card.text: Challenger, Absorb 1, Afflict 5 (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) --- (Front): Vi, The Piltover Enforcer

card.name: Veteran Investigator
card.text: Whenever Veteran Investigator enters, each player draws a card.

card.name: Vault Breaker
card.text: Multikicker {1}{UR} (You may pay an additional {1}{UR} any number of times as you cast this spell.) Choose target creature, then choose another target creature for each time this spell was kicked. Each creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Trail of Evidence
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with mana value 2, exile that card and then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast the card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Suit Up!
card.text: Target creatures base power and toughness becomes 4/4. Miracle {U}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Patrol Wardens
card.text: Miracle {1}{UR} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Insightful Investigator
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 2, exile the top card of your library. You may cast cards exiled this way from exile until the end of turn.

card.name: Gotcha!
card.text: Gotcha! deals 3 damage to target creature. Miracle {U}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Chief Mechanist Zevi
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, reveal it and create an exiled copy of that card. You may cast copies created this way from exile until the end of turn.

card.name: Subpurrsible
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When Subpurrsible enters, draw a card. Then if you have ten cards with different names in your graveyard, Subpurrsible gets +4/+0.

card.name: Wolfrider
card.text: Trample Plunder: add one mana of any color. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters add one mana of any color.)

card.name: Warmother Sejuani
card.text: Trample When Warmother Sejuani enters, target creature an opponent controls gets Frostbite and Vulnerable until the end of your next turn. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn. When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) The first time each turn a source you control deals damage to an opponent, put a Claw counter on Warmother Sejuani. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Warmother Sejuani has five or more Claw counters, remove all Claw counters from Warmother Sejuani and transform her. Partner --- (Back): Sejuani, The Fury of the North
card.related: Sejuani, The Fury of the North

card.name: Sejuani, The Fury of the North
card.text: Trample When Sejuani, The Fury of the North transforms, target creature an opponent controls gets Frostbite and Vulnerable until the end of your next turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) The first time each turn a source you control deals damage to an opponent, Frostbite each creature they control. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.) --- (Front): Warmother Sejuani

card.name: Ursine Spiritwalker
card.text: Plunder: transform Ursine Spiritwalker. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters transform Ursine Spiritwalker.) --- (Back): Stormclaw Ursine

card.name: Stormclaw Ursine
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control with power 5 or greater have Trample. --- (Front): Ursine Spiritwalker

card.name: The Tuskraider
card.text: When The Tuskraider enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Warmother Sejuani, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. Plunder: The Tuskraider gets the ability "Double the power and touchness of all cratures you control". (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this creature enters The Tuskraider gets the ability "Double the power and touchness of all cratures you control".)

card.name: Shared Spoils
card.text: The next three creatures that enters under your control enter with a +1/+1 counter. Plunder: reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature, add it to your hand and shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this spell is cast reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature, add it to your hand and shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.)

card.name: Ruthless Raider
card.text: Trample, Absorb 1

card.name: Fury of the North
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+4 until the end of turn.

card.name: Ember Maiden
card.text: At the start of your upkeep, Ember Maiden deals 1 damage to each player and each creature and planeswalker they control. Put a -1/-1 counter on Ember Maiden.

card.name: Caught in the Cold
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets Frostbite and Vulnerable until the end of turn. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn. When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Aurora Porealis
card.text: Search your library for two poro creatures with mana value 1 and put them onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle. You get an emblem with "Poro creatures you control get +2/+2"

card.name: The Leviathan
card.text: When The Leviathan enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Swain, The Master Tactician, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. At the start of your upkeep, The Leviathan deals 1 damage to each opponent. Repeat this process once.

card.name: Swain, The Master Tactician
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Swain deals combat damage to an opponent, Swain deals 3 damage to that opponent. Whenever an opponent takes noncombat damage from a source you control, put a Crow counter on Swain. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Swain has fourteen or more Crow counters, remove all Crow counters from Swain and transform him. Partner --- (Back): Swain, The Noxian Grand General

card.name: Swain, The Noxian Grand General
card.text: Trample, Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever an opponent takes noncombat damage from a source you control, put a stun counter on the creature with the highest power among creatures they control that does not have a stun counter. Whenever Swain deals combat damage to an opponent, Swain deals 3 damage to that opponent and each creature they control. --- (Front): Swain, The Master Tactician

card.name: Ravenous Flock
card.text: Ravenous Flock deals 4 damage to target creature that is damaged or has a stun counter.

card.name: Noxian Fervor
card.text: Noxian Fervor deals 3 damage to target creature you control to deal 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Iron Ballista
card.text: Trample

card.name: Imperial Demolitionist
card.text: When Imperial Demolitionist enters, Imperial Demolitionist deals 1 damage to other target creature you control to deal 2 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Death's Hand
card.text: Death's Hand deals 2 damage to target opponent, then deals 1 damage to target creature they control.

card.name: Citybreaker
card.text: At the start of your upkeep, Citybreaker deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Aurok Glinthorn
card.text: Whenever Aurok Glinthorn attacks, put a stun counter on all damaged creatures the defending opponent controls.

card.name: Armored Tuskrider
card.text: Trample Armored Tuskrider has protection from creatures with power 4 or less.

card.name: Thorny Toad
card.text: When Thorny Toad is destroyed, you gain 2 life and Toss 2. (Exile two cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Terror of the Tides
card.text: Deep (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.) Leviathan creatures you control have Fearsome. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever Terror of the Tides attacks, creatures your opponents control get -2/-0 until the end of the turn.

card.name: Sapling Toss
card.text: At the start of your next upkeep, create a Sapling token.

card.name: Sap Magic
card.text: Toss 3 (Exile three cards from the bottom of your library.) Remove up to 3 damage from all creatures you control.

card.name: Overgrown Snapvine
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever a non-legendary creature you control enters, destroy it and create an Overgrown Snapvine token.

card.name: Neverglade Collector
card.text: Whenever a creature you control is destroyed, Drain 1 from each opponent. (Neverglade Collector deals 1 damage. You gain that much life.)

card.name: Maokai
card.text: The first time you cast a creature each turn, Toss 2 and create a Sapling token. (Exile two cards from the bottom of your library.) Whenever a creature you control is destroyed, or whenever you toss a card, put that many Twisted counters on Maokai. Twisted counters cannot be proliferated or copied in any way. At the beginning of the end phase on your turn, if Maokai has twenty five or more Twisted counters, remove all Twisted counters from Maokai, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Maokai, The Twisted Treant

card.name: Maokai, The Twisted Treant
card.text: When Maokai transforms, exile each opponents library except the bottom four cards. Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) At the start of your upkeep, create a Sapling token --- (Front): Maokai

card.name: Deadbloom Wanderer
card.text: Lifelink When Deadbloom Wanderer enters, Toss 3. (Exile three cards from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Blighted Caretaker
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. When Blighted Caretaker enters create two Sapling tokens.

card.name: Barkbeast
card.text: The first time a creature you control dies while Barkbeast is on the battlefield, Barkbeast gets +2/+2.

card.name: Sonic Wave
card.text: Kicker {U} (You may pay an additional {U} as you cast this spell.) Target creature you control gets challenger until the end of turn. If Sonic Wave was kicked that creature gets +2/+0 until the end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)

card.name: Scales of the Dragon
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) When Scales of the Dragon enters, if it was kicked, target creature you control gets +2/+0.

card.name: Retreat
card.text: Kicker {U} (You may pay an additional {U} as you cast this spell.) Recall a creature you control. If Retreat was kicked, put a creature from your hand with mana value 3 or less onto the battlefield under your control. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Lee Sin, The Blind Monk
card.text: The first time you cast an instant or sorcery this turn, give Lee Sin challenger until the end of the turn. The second time you cast an instant or sorcery this turn, put a shield counter on Lee Sin. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery put a Monk counter on Lee Sin. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lee Sin has eight or more Monk counters, remove all Monk counters from Lee Sin and transform him. Partner --- (Back): Lee Sin, Monastery Guardian

card.name: Lee Sin, Monastery Guardian
card.text: The first time you cast an instant or sorcery this turn, give Lee Sin challenger until the end of the turn. The second time you cast an instant or sorcery this turn, put a shield counter on Lee Sin. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Whenever Lee Sin attacks, if he is blocked, after the damage step, if Lee Sin has not been destroyed, that creatures controller loses life equal to the blocking creatures power. If the blocking creature is not destroyed, it is Recalled. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.) --- (Front): Lee Sin, The Blind Monk

card.name: Horns of the Dragon
card.text: Double strike

card.name: Eye of the Dragon
card.text: Attune: {C} (When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.) At the start of your upkeep if you are in Flow create a Dragonling token. (At the start of your upkeep, if you cast two or more instants and/or sorcery spells during your last turn, you enter Flow until the start of your next upkeep.)

card.name: Dragon's Rage
card.text: A creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. Then that creatures controller loses life equal to that target creatures power. If the target creature is not destroyed, it is Recalled. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Deep Meditation
card.text: If you are in Flow Deep Meditation costs {2} less to cast. (At the start of your upkeep, if you cast two or more instants and/or sorcery spells during your last turn, you enter Flow until the start of your next upkeep.) Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two instant and/or sorcery cards, add them to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Concussive Palm
card.text: Tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Create a Tail of the Dragon token.

card.name: Claws of the Dragon
card.text: The first time you cast your second instant or sorcery this turn, you may cast this card from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Unyielding Spirit
card.text: Target creature you control gets Indestructible and "This permanent can't be sacrificed until the end of your next turn".

card.name: Ranger's Resolve
card.text: All creatures you control get Absorb 1 until the end of turn. (If a source would deal damage to that creature, prevent 1 of that damage.)

card.name: Quinn
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) When Quinn enters, create a Valor token. Whenever Quinn attacks, put a Wing counter on Quinn. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Quinn has four or more Wing counters, remove all Wing counters from Quinn, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Quinn, Demacia's Wings

card.name: Quinn, Demacia's Wings
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) Whenever Quinn attacks, create a tapped and attacking Valor token, forcing the creature with the highest power among creatures your opponent controls to block it. --- (Front): Quinn

card.name: Grizzled Ranger
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) When Grizzled Ranger is destroyed, create a Loyal Badgerbear token.

card.name: Greenfang Warden
card.text: Scout, Absorb 1 (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)

card.name: Greathorn Companion
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)

card.name: Genevieve Elmheart
card.text: Scout, Challenger (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) When Genevieve Elmheart enters, each other creature you control gets +1/+1 until the end of the turn.

card.name: Concerted Strike
card.text: Choose two creatures you control. Each creature chosen this way deals damage equal to their power to target creature.

card.name: Blinding Assault
card.text: Create a Valor token.

card.name: Warning Shot
card.text: Warning Shot deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Aurora Porealis LORT-RT
card.text: Poro creatures you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Lure of the Depths LORT-RT
card.text: Leviathan creatures you control cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Badlands
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)

card.name: Blood Crypt
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Rakdos Carnarium
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand. {T}: Add {B}{R}.
